text: Science has a clearer story about standard candles than social media does. Standard candles are cosmic lighthouses that help astronomers measure vast distances. Think of them as stars with a known brightness, allowing us to calculate how far away they are. Type Ia supernovae are perfect examples—they shine consistently bright. Using these candles, we estimate the universe's expansion rate, revealing its mysterious nature. Curious about the universe? Hit follow for more mind-blowing science!
